input.prompt: The shot starts on the messy starting setup related to Ellie Lamps - HTTYD – Elie crafts, with clutter, poor placement, or unfinished surroundings visible. A hand moves the wrong item into the setup, nudges clutter aside, and exposes the problem instead of fixing it. The shot ends with the messy setup still visible and more crowded than the first frame. Use the exact product from the product reference image. Preserve its shape, silhouette, material, texture, color, proportions, and distinctive details. Do not redesign or replace it. Only change its position, rotation, scale within the scene, and lighting.
